protein_name: Ligand for members of the frizzled family of seven transmembrane receptors. Plays a role in embryonic patterning. Belongs to the Wnt family. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Protein type: Extracellular matrix; Secreted; Secreted, signal peptide
raw_fields.Cellular Component: extracellular matrix; extracellular region; extracellular space
raw_fields.Molecular Function: cytokine activity; frizzled binding; receptor ligand activity; signaling receptor binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: anterior/posterior axis specification; canonical Wnt signaling pathway; cell fate commitment; dorsal/ventral axis specification; neural crest cell fate commitment; neuron differentiation; positive regulation of transcription by RNA polymerase II; response to retinoic acid; secondary palate development; Wnt signaling pathway
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: Protein Wnt-8a; Protein Wnt-8d; wingless-type MMTV integration site family, member 8A; Wnt family member 8A; WNT8A; WNT8D
